Cornucopia Heroic Challenge
Dried Assortment Amulet

When taking magic damage, the amulet owner increases magic armor by 5% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 20 times.

When taking physical damage, the amulet owner increases physical armor by 5% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 20 times.

Requirements: 98-100
